title: docs: update README — 2026-07-06
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt: Daily README update: Latest News section. (Recent Apps is refreshed by app-update-metrics.yml.)

gist.headline: Daily News Refresh
gist.blurb: Our automated bot just swept through the README to keep the latest news fresh and up to date.
gist.summary: Automated daily update to the Latest News section in the repository README.
gist.impact: Keeps the project's landing page current with the latest community updates and announcements.
gist.visual_concept: The robot companion updating a bulletin board or reading a newspaper, with Polly the bee helping out.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a chunky robot with a CRT monitor head pinning a fresh news clipping to a wooden bulletin board. The cute bee mascot hovers nearby holding a tiny newspaper. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel peach gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
